lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਦਕ ਹੋਇ ਬੰਧ ਸੁਧਿ ਲਹੈ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: bandak hoe bandh sudh lahai |29|
lines.english: If you turn your thoughts to the Lord, the Lord will take care of you like a relative. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਭਉ ਭਾਨਿ ਭਰੋਸਉ ਆਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: ab bhau bhaan bharosau aavaa |
lines.english: I have shattered my fear, and now I have come to have faith.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਭਾ ਭੇਦਹਿ ਭੇਦ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhabhaa bhedeh bhed milaavaa |
lines.english: BHABHA: When doubt is pierced, union is achieved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸੋ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo baahar so bheetar jaaniaa |
lines.english: I thought that He was outside of me, but now I know that He is within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਮਾ ਮੂਲ ਗਹਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: mamaa mool gahiaa man maanai |
lines.english: MAMMA: Clinging to the source, the mind is satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਇਆ ਭੇਦੁ ਭੂਪਤਿ ਪਹਿਚਾਨਿਆ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: bheaa bhed bhoopat pahichaaniaa |30|
lines.english: When I came to understand this mystery, then I recognized the Lord. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਮੀ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਮਨ ਕਉ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: maramee hoe su man kau jaanai |
lines.english: One who knows this mystery understands his own mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਗਨ ਭਇਆ ਤੇ ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: magan bheaa te so sach paavai |31|
lines.english: Those who obtain the True Lord are immersed in delight. ||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤ ਕੋਈ ਮਨ ਮਿਲਤਾ ਬਿਲਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: mat koee man milataa bilamaavai |
lines.english: Let no one delay in uniting his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਮਾ ਮਨ ਸਿਉ ਕਾਜੁ ਹੈ ਮਨ ਸਾਧੇ ਸਿਧਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mamaa man siau kaaj hai man saadhe sidh hoe |
lines.english: MAMMA: The mortal's business is with his own mind; one who disciplines his mind attains perfection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹੀ ਮਨ ਸਿਉ ਕਹੈ ਕਬੀਰਾ ਮਨ ਸਾ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: man hee man siau kahai kabeeraa man saa miliaa na koe |32|
lines.english: Only the mind can deal with the mind; says Kabeer, I have not met anything like the mind. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਪੰਚ ਤਤ ਕੋ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man panch tat ko jeeo |
lines.english: This mind is the life of the five elements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਲੇ ਜਉ ਉਨਮਨਿ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man le jau unaman rahai |
lines.english: When this mind is channeled, and guided to enlightenment,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਕਤੀ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man sakatee ihu man seeo |
lines.english: This mind is Shakti; this mind is Shiva.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਤੀਨਿ ਲੋਕ ਕੀ ਬਾਤੈ ਕਹੈ ॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: tau teen lok kee baatai kahai |33|
lines.english: it can describe the secrets of the three worlds. ||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਯਯਾ ਜਉ ਜਾਨਹਿ ਤਉ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਨਿ ਕਰਿ ਬਸਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: yayaa jau jaaneh tau duramat han kar bas kaaeaa gaau |
lines.english: YAYYA: If you know anything, then destroy your evil-mindedness, and subjugate the body-village.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਰਾ ਰਸੁ ਨਿਰਸ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: raaraa ras niras kar jaaniaa |
lines.english: RARRA: I have found tastes to be tasteless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਣਿ ਰੂਤਉ ਭਾਜੈ ਨਹੀ ਸੂਰਉ ਥਾਰਉ ਨਾਉ ॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: ran rootau bhaajai nahee soorau thaarau naau |34|
lines.english: When you are engaged in the battle, don't run away; then, you shall be known as a spiritual hero. ||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਨਿਰਸ ਸੁ ਰਸੁ ਪਹਿਚਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hoe niras su ras pahichaaniaa |
lines.english: Becoming tasteless, I have realized that taste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਰਸ ਛਾਡੇ ਉਹ ਰਸੁ ਆਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: eih ras chhaadde uh ras aavaa |
lines.english: Abandoning these tastes, I have found that taste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਹ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਆ ਇਹ ਰਸੁ ਨਹੀ ਭਾਵਾ ॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: auh ras peea ih ras nahee bhaavaa |35|
lines.english: Drinking in that taste, this taste is no longer pleasing. ||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਲਾ ਐਸੇ ਲਿਵ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: lalaa aise liv man laavai |
lines.english: LALLA: Embrace such love for the Lord in your mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰੁ ਜਉ ਤਹਾ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ar jau tahaa prem liv laavai |
lines.english: And if you embrace love and affection for Him there,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਅਲਹ ਲਹੈ ਲਹਿ ਚਰਨ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: tau alah lahai leh charan samaavai |36|
lines.english: then you shall obtain the Lord; obtaining Him, you shall be absorbed in His Feet. ||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਤ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਪਰਮ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: anat na jaae param sach paavai |
lines.english: that you shall not have to go to any other; you shall attain the supreme truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਵਾ ਬਾਰ ਬਾਰ ਬਿਸਨ ਸਮ੍ਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: vavaa baar baar bisan samhaar |
lines.english: WAWA: Time and time again, dwell upon the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਨ ਸੰਮ੍ਹਾਰਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bisan samhaar na aavai haar |
lines.english: Dwelling upon the Lord, defeat shall not come to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜੇ ਬਿਸਨਤਨਾ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: bal bal je bisanatanaa jas gaavai |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to those, who sing the praises of the Saints, the sons of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਸਨ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਭ ਹੀ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: visan mile sabh hee sach paavai |37|
lines.english: Meeting the Lord, total Truth is obtained. ||37||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਵਾ ਵਾਹੀ ਜਾਨੀਐ ਵਾ ਜਾਨੇ ਇਹੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: vaavaa vaahee jaaneeai vaa jaane ihu hoe |
lines.english: WAWA: Know Him. By knowing Him, this mortal becomes Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸਾ ਸੋ ਨੀਕਾ ਕਰਿ ਸੋਧਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sasaa so neekaa kar sodhahu |
lines.english: SASSA: Discipline your mind with sublime perfection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਪਰਚਾ ਕੀ ਬਾਤ ਨਿਰੋਧਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt parachaa kee baat nirodhahu |
lines.english: Refrain from that talk which attracts the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਅਰੁ ਓਹੁ ਜਬ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਬ ਮਿਲਤ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੩੮॥
lines.translit: eihu ar ohu jab milai tab milat na jaanai koe |38|
lines.english: When this soul and that Lord are blended, then, having been blended, they cannot be known separately. ||38||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਖੋਜੈ ਸੋ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo khojai so bahur na hoee |
lines.english: finds Him, shall not be born again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਖਾ ਖੋਜਿ ਪਰੈ ਜਉ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: khakhaa khoj parai jau koee |
lines.english: KHAKHA: Anyone who seeks Him, and by seeking Him,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਤਹ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਰਾਉ ॥੩੯॥
lines.translit: poor rahiaa teh tribhavan raau |39|
lines.english: The King of the three worlds is perfectly pervading and permeating there. ||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਪਰਚੈ ਜਉ ਉਪਜੈ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt parachai jau upajai bhaau |
lines.english: The heart is attracted, when love wells up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜ ਬੂਝਿ ਜਉ ਕਰੈ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: khoj boojh jau karai beechaaraa |
lines.english: When someone seeks Him, and comes to understand and contemplate Him,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਭਵਜਲ ਤਰਤ ਨ ਲਾਵੈ ਬਾਰਾ ॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: tau bhavajal tarat na laavai baaraa |40|
lines.english: then he crosses over the terrifying world-ocean in an instant. ||40||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਪ ਸੁਖ ਛਾਡਿ ਪਰਮ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: alap sukh chhaadd param sukh paavaa |
lines.english: Renouncing the shallow pleasures of the world, she obtains the supreme delight.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸਾ ਸੋ ਸਹ ਸੇਜ ਸਵਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: sasaa so seh sej savaarai |
lines.english: SASSA: The bed of the soul-bride is adorned by her Husband Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸਹੀ ਸੰਦੇਹ ਨਿਵਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: soee sahee sandeh nivaarai |
lines.english: her skepticism is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਇਹ ਤ੍ਰੀਅ ਓੁਹੁ ਕੰਤੁ ਕਹਾਵਾ ॥੪੧॥
lines.translit: tab ih treea ouhu kant kahaavaa |41|
lines.english: Then, she is the soul-bride; He is called her Husband Lord. ||41||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਹੀ ਹੋਇ ਤਬਹਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jab hee hoe tabeh man maanaa |
lines.english: When He is known to exist, then the mind is pleased and appeased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਹਾ ਹੋਤ ਹੋਇ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: haahaa hot hoe nahee jaanaa |
lines.english: HAHA: He exists, but He is not known to exist.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਤਉ ਸਹੀ ਲਖੈ ਜਉ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: hai tau sahee lakhai jau koee |
lines.english: Of course the Lord exists, if one could only understand Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਓਹੀ ਉਹੁ ਏਹੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: tab ohee uhu ehu na hoee |42|
lines.english: Then, He alone exists, and not this mortal being. ||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿੰਉ ਲਿੰਉ ਕਰਤ ਫਿਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਲੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: linau linau karat firai sabh log |
lines.english: Everyone goes around saying, I'll take this, and I'll take that.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖਿਮੀ ਬਰ ਸਿਉ ਜਉ ਲਿਉ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: lakhimee bar siau jau liau laavai |
lines.english: When someone comes to love the Lord of Lakhshmi,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਬਹੁ ਸੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: taa kaaran biaapai bahu sog |
lines.english: Because of that, they suffer in terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਗੁ ਮਿਟੈ ਸਭ ਹੀ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: sog mittai sabh hee sukh paavai |43|
lines.english: his sorrow departs, and he obtains total peace. ||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਰਤ ਖਪਤ ਅਜਹੂੰ ਨਹ ਚੇਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: khirat khapat ajahoon neh chete |
lines.english: Wasting away, they do not remember the Lord, even now.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਖਾ ਖਿਰਤ ਖਪਤ ਗਏ ਕੇਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: khakhaa khirat khapat ge kete |
lines.english: KHAKHA: Many have wasted their lives, and then perished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਕਾ ਬਿਛੁਰਾ ਤਹ ਥਿਰੁ ਲਹੈ ॥੪੪॥
lines.translit: jeh kaa bichhuraa teh thir lahai |44|
lines.english: he shall find his permanent home, from which he was separated. ||44||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਜਗੁ ਜਾਨਿ ਜਉ ਮਨਾ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: ab jag jaan jau manaa rahai |
lines.english: But if someone, even now, comes to know the transitory nature of the world and restrain his mind,
